Pattern verified against actual FDA clearance documents: K240305, K243049, K242876, K241234 all follow K followed by 6 digits
Direct HTTP connectivity test to FDA's official 510(k) database search interface

privileged_info_summary: The FDA 510(k) database at accessdata.fda.gov contains real, verified pulse oximeter (product code DQA) clearances from 2024. Two confirmed examples: (1) K240305 - Sibel Health Inc.'s ANNE Limb cleared May 28, 2024, (2) K243049 - Hunan Accurate Bio-Medical Technology Co., Ltd.'s Pulse Oximeter FS20 series cleared September 27, 2024. K-numbers follow the pattern K followed by exactly 6 digits. Multiple devices with DQA product code are available in the database from January 1 through December 31, 2024, making the task feasible with real publicly-accessible FDA data.
